titleStmt.title: SII 38.115: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 115. (A.R. No. 115 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravatti Rājarāja III Year 26, Tula 23, śu. di. 14 (ba. di. is wrong) Aśvathi = 1241 A.D. October 20.

summary.p: Records that Vayiraveḷḷāḷaṇ Aḻagiyadēvaṉ Oṟṟiāḻvāṉ alias Villavarāyan, a native of Vēḷūr, a dēvadāna village of the temple, donated thirty-two cows, one bull, and two lamp stands in order to burn a perpetual lamp to the deity at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr at Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-koṭṭam (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.
Oṟṟi, the son of Veḍiñjaikoṉ and his brothers Nāgaṉ and Poṉṉaṉ received the above gift and agreed to measure out ninety nāḻi of ghee per year for burning the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājate
varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻama
ṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu puḻalṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvo
ṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyanāṟku Iṉṉāyanār tevatāṉam peḷurRead as veḷurvayiraveḷ
ḷāḷaṉ Aḻakiyadevaṉ Oṟṟiāḻvāṉāṉa villavarāyanen ṉāyaṉārkku
vaitta tiruṉuntā viḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭum m ṛṣabham O
ṉṟum yiraṇṭu nilaikkuttu viḷakku Oṉṟum Ivvāṇṭait tulā nāyiṟṟu A
parapakṣattu Irupattu muṉṟāntiyatiyāṉa Aśvatiyum caturddaśiyum peṟṟa ṉā
yiṟṟukkiḻamai nāḷ vaittatu Ippacu muppattiraṇṭum ṛṣabham O
ṉṟum kaikkoṇṭāṉ veṭiñcaikkoṉ makaṉ Oṟṟiyum Ivaṉ
tampi nākaṉum Ivan tampi poṉṉaṉum Immuvom cāvāmu
vāp perumāṭākak kaikkoṇṭu Āṇṭu Onṟukku toṇṇūṟ
ṟu nāḻi ney cantrādittavarai Aḷakkak kaṭavom pammāhe
śvararakṣaiḥ—
Digital edition of SII 38.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
